response:
The screen glows blue in evening's hush,
As seasons flow in one long rush.
The world outside begins to blush.

We've clicked "next episode" again,
Lost in the stories of other men,
Until the sun paints the window pane.

The plotlines twist, the credits roll,
They take a devastating toll
Upon the ever-waking soul.

We've conquered seasons, one through ten,
And though our eyes are weary when
We finally rise, we'll binge again.
